markdown:
#  Which fields can Procore automatically populate when uploading specifications? 
##  Answer 
When you upload new specifications to a project, Procore can automatically populate the following fields to help expedite the upload and review process:
  * **Specification Number** (number and description)
  * **Specification Division** (number and description)


Procore leverages text parsing technology to intelligently discover and pre-fill these fields with the correct value based upon the number of each specification section and division.
#####  Tip
In order to improve the accuracy of this automatic text parsing (specification section identification), we recommend you configure your specification book with the format outlined in [How can I improve the accuracy of Specification Section Identification?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-can-i-improve-the-accuracy-of-specification-section-identification)
## See Also

title: Which fields can Procore automatically populate when uploading specifications?
description: Procore uses OCR to automatically populate drawing title, number, and discipline.
